[[en:Zhen]] [[sn:Zhen]] [[nl:Donder (trigram)]] [[fr:Zh%C3%A8n]] [[ar:Zhèn (Bagua)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[fr:Zhèn]] [[ko:진 (괘)]] [[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]] [[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]] [[zh-yue:震卦]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Rekichū]][[sn:Zhèn (Bagua)]][[Category:Rekichū]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

[[en:Zhen]] [[sn:Zhen]] [[nl:Donder (trigram)]] [[fr:Zh%C3%A8n]] [[ar:Zhèn (Bagua)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[fr:Zhèn]] [[ko:진 (괘)]] [[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]] [[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]] [[zh-yue:震卦]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Rekichū]][[sn:Zhèn (Bagua)]][[Category:Rekichū]] {{wikidata link|Q2650821}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh_min_nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh_yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh min nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh_yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh_yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

[[en:Zhen]] [[sn:Zhen]] [[nl:Donder (trigram)]] [[fr:Zh%C3%A8n]] [[ar:Zhèn (Bagua)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[fr:Zhèn]] [[ko:진 (괘)]] [[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]] [[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]] [[zh-yue:震卦]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Rekichū]][[sn:Zhèn (Bagua)]][[Category:Rekichū]] {{wikidata link|Q2650821}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

[[en:Zhen]] [[sn:Zhen]] [[nl:Donder (trigram)]] [[fr:Zh%C3%A8n]] [[ar:Zhèn (Bagua)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[fr:Zhèn]] [[ko:진 (괘)]] [[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]] [[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]] [[zh-yue:震卦]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Rekichū]][[sn:Zhèn (Bagua)]][[Category:Rekichū]] {{wikidata link|Q2650821}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

[[en:Zhen]] [[sn:Zhen]] [[nl:Donder (trigram)]] [[fr:Zh%C3%A8n]] [[ar:Zhèn (Bagua)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[fr:Zhèn]] [[ko:진 (괘)]] [[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]] [[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]] [[zh-yue:震卦]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Rekichū]][[sn:Zhèn (Bagua)]][[Category:Rekichū]] {{wikidata link|Q2650821}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

[[en:Zhen]] [[sn:Zhen]] [[nl:Donder (trigram)]] [[fr:Zh%C3%A8n]] [[ar:Zhèn (Bagua)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[fr:Zhèn]] [[ko:진 (괘)]] [[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]] [[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]] [[zh-yue:震卦]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Rekichū]][[sn:Zhèn (Bagua)]][[Category:Rekichū]] {{wikidata link|Q2650821}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Non matching pagename on wikidata]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

[[en:Zhen]] [[sn:Zhen]] [[nl:Donder (trigram)]] [[fr:Zh%C3%A8n]] [[ar:Zhèn (Bagua)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[fr:Zhèn]] [[ko:진 (괘)]] [[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]] [[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]] [[zh-yue:震卦]] [[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]] [[Category:Rekichū]][[sn:Zhèn (Bagua)]][[Category:Rekichū]] {{wikidata link|Q2650821}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2650821]] Wikidata name: zhèn [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Bagua|qq=}} '''Zhen''' (震) is one of the [[:en:Bagua|Bagua]]. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the [[:en:Hexagram (I Ching)|Sixty-Four Hexagrams]], known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.
== Trigram Symbolism == The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of [[:en:Lightning|thunder]]), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, [[:en:Foot|feet]], the eldest son, and young men. As a [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five directions]], it represents [[:en:East|east]]<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the [[:en:Liver|liver]], and [[:en:Metabolism|metabolism]].
In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in [[:en:Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Five Elements (Wuxing)]], and the [[:en:West|west]] among the [[:en:Cardinal direction|Five Directions]].
== Earlier Heaven Arrangement == In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.
