Wikidata name: zhèn
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]

{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]

{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]

{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]

{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams|1=Hexagram (I Ching)}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder|1=Lightning}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=Dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet|1=Foot}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions|1=Cardinal direction}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east|1=East}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver|1=Liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism|1=Metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west|1=West}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions|1=Cardinal direction}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528|1=Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]

{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams|1=Hexagram (I Ching)}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder|1=Lightning}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=Dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet|1=Foot}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions|1=Cardinal direction}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east|1=East}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver|1=Liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism|1=Metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west|1=West}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions|1=Cardinal direction}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528|1=Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]

{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams|1=Hexagram (I Ching)}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder|1=Lightning}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=Dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet|1=Foot}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions|1=Cardinal direction}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east|1=East}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver|1=Liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism|1=Metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west|1=West}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions|1=Cardinal direction}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528|1=Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams|1=Hexagram (I Ching)}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder|1=Lightning}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=Dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet|1=Foot}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions|1=Cardinal direction}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east|1=East}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver|1=Liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism|1=Metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west|1=West}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions|1=Cardinal direction}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528|1=Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams|1=Hexagram (I Ching)}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder|1=Lightning}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=Dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet|1=Foot}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions|1=Cardinal direction}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east|1=East}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver|1=Liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism|1=Metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west|1=West}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions|1=Cardinal direction}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528|1=Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Zhèn]][[ja:震]][[ko:진 (괘)]][[nl:Donder (trigram)]][[pt:Zhèn (I Ching)]][[zh-min-nan:Chìn-kòa]][[zh-yue:震卦]][[zh:震卦]]

{{Bagua|qq=}}
'''Zhen''' (震) is one of the {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|WD=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}}. Its trigram form is {{resize|125%|'''☳'''|qq=}} with the first {{ill|Yao (lines)|ja|爻|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yao (lines)|qq=}} being Yang (⚊) and the second and third Yao being Yin (⚋). It is also one of the {{ill|Hexagram (I Ching)|en|Hexagram (I Ching)|WD=Q1572403|lt=Sixty-Four Hexagrams|1=Hexagram (I Ching)}}, known as {{ill|Zhen as Thunder|ja|震|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|2=ja|3=震|lt=Zhèn (震)|1=Zhèn (Bagua)|lt=Zhen為雷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhen as Thunder|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhèn (Bagua)|qq=}}, consisting of Zhen below and Zhen above.

== Trigram Symbolism ==
The original meaning represents the emergence of a single Yang at the bottom, moving forward without limits. From this, it symbolizes the time of initiation, thunderclaps (the sound of {{ill|Lightning|en|Lightning|WD=Q33741|lt=thunder|1=Lightning}}), {{ill|dragons|ja|龍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/dragons|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 竜|1=Dragon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q7559}}, {{ill|Foot|en|Foot|WD=Q15807|lt=feet|1=Foot}}, the eldest son, and young men. As a {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five directions|1=Cardinal direction}}, it represents {{ill|East|en|East|WD=Q684|lt=east|1=East}}<ref>「[https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/chapter3/s2.html 干支2方位神]」National Diet Library, accessed December 16, 2021.</ref> (corresponding to {{ill|Mao (Earthly Branch)|ja|卯|1=mǎo|lt=Rabbit (卯)|2=ja|3=卯|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|2=ja|3=卯|4=fr|5=Lapin (astrologie chinoise)|6=nl|7=Konijn (astrologie)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|1=Rabbit (zodiac)|lt=Rabbit (卯)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mao (Earthly Branch)|13=User:Immanuelle/Rabbit (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16662792}} in the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|地支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earthly Branches|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 十二支|1=Earthly Branches|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1072961}}). In modern society, it is associated with telecommunications, high-speed communication, and at times, deceit. Physically, it corresponds to hearing, the {{ill|Liver|en|Liver|WD=Q9368|lt=liver|1=Liver}}, and {{ill|Metabolism|en|Metabolism|WD=Q1057|lt=metabolism|1=Metabolism}}.

In the {{ill|Na Jia|ja|納甲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na Jia|qq=}} system, Zhen is associated with {{ill|Geng (Heavenly Stem)|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng (Heavenly Stem)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}}, the Metal element in {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|WD=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}, and the {{ill|West|en|West|WD=Q679|lt=west|1=West}} among the {{ill|Cardinal direction|en|Cardinal direction|WD=Q23718|lt=Five Directions|1=Cardinal direction}}.

== Earlier Heaven Arrangement ==
In the {{ill|Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja|伏羲先天八卦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491528|1=Fuxi Earlier Heaven Bagua}}, Zhen is the fourth in sequence and is positioned as one of the four corner trigrams, representing {{ill|northeast|ja|北東|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/northeast|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Northeast|WD=Q6497686}}. In terms of Yin-Yang transformation, it represents the emergence of one Yang.
